[[File:Vesta's longsword detail.png|150px|left]]
'''Vesta's longsword''' is a slash weapon requiring level 78 [[Attack]] to wield. It is part of [[Vesta's equipment]], a set of [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]].

On permanent [[Deadman Mode]] worlds, it is dropped by any monster found in the [[Wilderness]] as part of a [[Deadman Mode#Global loot table|global loot table]], the chance being relative to the combat level of the monster. It can also be obtained from looting [[Deadman's chest (scenery)|Deadman's chests]] and as a drop from [[breach monster]]s in [[Deadman: Annihilation]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Feint.gif|thumb|260px|A player performing Vesta's longsword's special attack.]]
Vesta's longsword has a [[special attack]], ''Feint'', that consumes 25% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and deals between 20% and 120% of the user's max hit, with the accuracy of this attack rolled against 25% of the opponent's [[defence]]. The accuracy roll of ''Feint'' is based on the attack bonus of the player's currently selected style, which is rolled against an opponent's stab defence.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1532683828803866625|date=3 June 2022|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220603131441/https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1532683828803866625|archivedate=3 June 2022|quote=[Hello darling @JagexAsh a VLS is a 'Slash sword' but the special looks like it uses Stab, is it rolled on either or just a neutral hit (...)] It takes the accuracy of whatever stance you've got selected, and rolls that against the target's stab defence.}}
